prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年华南师范大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约20176→23667→28246→29684→33035名，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约12859名；2024至2025年一年间后移约3351名，后移速度有所加快；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年为36人，2022–2025年均为40人，2026年仍为40人，与2025年持平。计划未扩也未缩，但浙江省2026年高考报名总人数约40万人，较2025年约29万人大幅增加约37.6%，考生基数显著扩大，同等计划下录取竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华南师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第75名、2022年第78名、2023年第79名、2024年第79名、2025年第80名、2026年第79名，近年排名稳定在75–80区间，学校层次无明显变化；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，仅涉及1件与学校管理相关的舆情事件，无重大正面或负面冲击；抖音综合热度排名第70位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏下水平；近年无投档线断档或异常记录。整体声誉信号对报考热度影响中性；第五轮学科评估中，心理学获评A+（全国顶尖），马克思主义理论获评A，体育学、教育学获评A-。其中思想政治教育（师范）专业对应马克思主义理论A级学科，是该校在浙招生专业中的亮点。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度从2022年的"推荐"逐步降温至2024年的"分化观望"，整体趋于平稳；计算机类、电子信息/通信类持续高热推荐，但该校相关专业在浙招生位次处于中档水平。浙江省2021–2025年；华南师范大学位于广东省广州市，在浙江省招生人数较少（2021年36人、2022–2025年40人），占该校全国招生总人数比例约1.2%–1.5%，属于跨省招生中的中等规模。广东高校在浙江的报考热度近年总体平稳，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平而浙江省考生总数大幅增加约37.6%导致竞争加剧、学校层次与声誉无明显变化、师范类专业热度分化观望等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年33035名基础上继续后移。预测最低位次约33535名，区间33035–34035名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间33035–34035名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。若位次优于区间下限（小于33035名），可重点冲刺一档的汉语言文学（师范）、思想政治教育（师范）等优势专业；若位次接近区间上限（34035名附近），应以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次较低的专业。计算机科学与技术、网络工程、光电信息科学与工程等专业虽属二档，但对应计算机类/电子信息类社会热度持续高热，实际竞争可能高于位次排序，报考时需留有余量。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for South China Normal University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 20176 → 23667 → 28246 → 29684 → 33035, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12859 positions over the past 5 years; from 2024 to 2025, the backward shift was about 3351 positions, indicating an acceleration; the university's enrollment plan in Zhejiang's comprehensive category was 36 in 2021, 40 from 2022 to 2025, and remains 40 in 2026, unchanged from 2025. The plan has neither expanded nor contracted, but the total number of candidates for the 2026 Zhejiang college entrance examination is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to about 290,000 in 2025, with a substantially expanded candidate base, intensifying admission competition under the same plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 75th in 2021, 78th in 2022, 79th in 2023, 79th in 2024, 80th in 2025, and 79th in 2026, with stable rankings in the 75–80 range in recent years, showing no significant change in university level; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, involving only one public opinion event related to school management, with no major positive or negative impact; the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 70th, rated as 'average', with short video platform attention at a moderately low level; there have been no records of admission cutoff line breaks or anomalies in recent years. The overall reputation signal has a neutral impact on application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Psychology was rated A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory was rated A, and Physical Education and Education were rated A-. Among them, the Ideological and Political Education (Teacher Training) major corresponds to the A-level Marxist Theory discipline, which is a highlight among the university's majors recruiting in Zhejiang.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training/education majors has gradually cooled from 'recommended' in 2022 to 'differentiated wait-and-see' in 2024, overall trending towards stability; computer science, electronic information/communication majors continue to be highly recommended, but the university's related majors in Zhejiang are at a mid-level admission ranking. Zhejiang Province 2021–2025; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, with a small number of students recruited in Zhejiang (36 in 2021, 40 from 2022 to 2025), accounting for about 1.2%–1.5% of the university's total national enrollment, which is a medium scale among cross-provincial recruitment. The popularity of Guangdong universities in Zhejiang has been generally stable in recent years, with no significant regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026 with a significant increase of about 37.6% in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province leading to intensified competition, no significant change in university level and reputation, and the differentiated wait-and-see popularity of teacher training majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 33035. The predicted minimum ranking is about 33535, with a range of 33035–34035.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 33035–34035, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (less than 33035), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Chinese Language and Literature (Teacher Training) and Ideological and Political Education (Teacher Training); if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 34035), you should mainly consider Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 2 majors. Although majors like Computer Science and Technology, Network Engineering, and Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering are in Tier 2, they correspond to the continuously high social popularity of computer/electronic information categories, and actual competition may be higher than the ranking suggests, so a buffer should be left when applying.
